'''âs-f-p''' ('''kasafap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quickdrop|quickdrop]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-f-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quickdrop|quickdrop]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-f-p
|-
! Lemma
| kasafap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisafap|thisafap]] || [[word:jisafap|jisafap]] || [[word:shisafap|shisafap]] || [[word:kisafap|kisafap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusafap|thuthusafap]] || [[word:jujusafap|jujusafap]] || [[word:shushusafap|shushusafap]] || [[word:kukusafap|kukusafap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusafap|thusafap]] || [[word:jusafap|jusafap]] || [[word:shusafap|shusafap]] || [[word:kusafap|kusafap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusafap|thusafap]] || [[word:jusafap|jusafap]] || [[word:shusafap|shusafap]] || [[word:kusafap|kusafap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesafap|thesafap]] || [[word:jesafap|jesafap]] || [[word:shesafap|shesafap]] || [[word:kesafap|kesafap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosafap|thothosafap]] || [[word:jojosafap|jojosafap]] || [[word:shoshosafap|shoshosafap]] || [[word:kokosafap|kokosafap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosafap|thosafap]] || [[word:josafap|josafap]] || [[word:shosafap|shosafap]] || [[word:kosafap|kosafap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosafap|thosafap]] || [[word:josafap|josafap]] || [[word:shosafap|shosafap]] || [[word:kosafap|kosafap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠsafap|thĂŠsafap]] || [[word:jĂŠsafap|jĂŠsafap]] || [[word:shĂŠsafap|shĂŠsafap]] || [[word:kĂŠsafap|kĂŠsafap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasafap|thathasafap]] || [[word:jajasafap|jajasafap]] || [[word:shashasafap|shashasafap]] || [[word:kakasafap|kakasafap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasafap|thasafap]] || [[word:jasafap|jasafap]] || [[word:shasafap|shasafap]] || [[word:kasafap|kasafap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasafap|thasafap]] || [[word:jasafap|jasafap]] || [[word:shasafap|shasafap]] || [[word:kasafap|kasafap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasafap|shasafap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasafap|goshasafap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasafap|gokishasafap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasafapnĂŒ|shasafapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasafapnknĂŒ|goshasafapnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasafapnĂŒ|gokishasafapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasafapshĂ«|shasafapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasafapnkshĂ«|goshasafapnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasafapshĂ«|gokishasafapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasafapro|shasafapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasafapnkro|goshasafapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasafapro|gokishasafapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasafapmu|shasafapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasafapnkmu|goshasafapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasafapmu|gokishasafapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasafapsher|shasafapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasafapnksher|goshasafapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasafapsher|gokishasafapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasafapng|shasafapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasafapnkng|goshasafapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasafapng|gokishasafapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasafapya|shasafapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasafapnkya|goshasafapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasafapya|gokishasafapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasafapyam|shasafapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasafapnkyam|goshasafapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasafapyam|gokishasafapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasafapnĂŒshĂ«|shasafapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasafapnknĂŒshĂ«|goshasafapnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasafapnĂŒshĂ«|gokishasafapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasafapnĂŒro|shasafapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasafapnknĂŒro|goshasafapnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasafapnĂŒro|gokishasafapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasafapnĂŒmu|shasafapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasafapnknĂŒmu|goshasafapnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasafapnĂŒmu|gokishasafapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasafapshĂ«nĂŒ|shasafapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasafapnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshasafapnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasafapshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishasafapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasafapshĂ«ro|shasafapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasafapnkshĂ«ro|goshasafapnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasafapshĂ«ro|gokishasafapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasafapshĂ«mu|shasafapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasafapnkshĂ«mu|goshasafapnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasafapshĂ«mu|gokishasafapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasafapronĂŒ|shasafapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasafapnkronĂŒ|goshasafapnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasafapronĂŒ|gokishasafapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasafaproshĂ«|shasafaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasafapnkroshĂ«|goshasafapnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasafaproshĂ«|gokishasafaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasafapromu|shasafapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasafapnkromu|goshasafapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasafapromu|gokishasafapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasafapmunĂŒ|shasafapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasafapnkmunĂŒ|goshasafapnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasafapmunĂŒ|gokishasafapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasafapmushĂ«|shasafapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasafapnkmushĂ«|goshasafapnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasafapmushĂ«|gokishasafapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasafapmuro|shasafapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasafapnkmuro|goshasafapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasafapmuro|gokishasafapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
